name: Service DoS Attack Detected
notes: Reports a DoS attack against a local target that is known to exist and the target port is open.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:HostDefinition: Host with Port Open

when the event category for the event is one of the following DOS.Database DoS, DOS.DNS Service DoS, DOS.FTP DoS, DOS.Mail Service DoS, DOS.Telnet DoS, DOS.Unix DOS, DOS.Web Service DoS, DOS.Windows DoS
TD_list: APPLY Service DoS Attack Detected on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:HostDefinition: Host with Port Open

AND when the event category for the event is one of the following DOS.Database DoS, DOS.DNS Service DoS, DOS.FTP DoS, DOS.Mail Service DoS, DOS.Telnet DoS, DOS.Unix DOS, DOS.Web Service DoS, DOS.Windows DoS
RED_list: Event name: Service DoS Attack Detected
Event description: The system has identified a Service DoS Attack
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should not contribute to the naming of the associated offense(s)
